title: Coca-Cola’s AI-powered José Mourinho campaign could signal a shift in celebrity partnerships
description: Instead of featuring José Mourinho, the incoming manager of the Real Madrid soccer team, the series will be hosted by Mourinho’s AI clone.

title: Nest New York brings its fragrance-layering strategy to the U.K.
description: The fragrance brand is expanding its U.K. presence through e-tailer Cult Beauty, department stores Harrods and Selfridges, and specialty retailer John Bell & Croyden.

title: 11 retailers cite how rising oil costs are impacting supply chains
description:
Online retailers across categories are feeling the impact of rising oil costs on their supply chains. Executives at these leading retailers shared in their most recent quarterly earnings calls how oil costs will affect pricing and other strategies. Some executives also have shared how changing policies surrounding tariffs are affecting fiscal guidance for the remainder […]
The post 11 retailers cite how rising oil costs are impacting supply chains appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Ecommerce Trends: What matters as much as tech to get omnichannel experiences right
description:
Omnichannel experiences remain a priority for many of the leading Retail Chains in North America, especially when it comes to fulfillment. From Academy Sports and Outdoors tightening its fulfillment data-awareness across channels, to Kohl’s finding ways to reduce friction through omnichannel options, the topic is top of mind for leaders in online retail who want […]
The post Ecommerce Trends: What matters as much as tech to get omnichannel experiences right appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Retailers turn to AI for productivity, personalized shopping
description: Best Buy, Gap and Dick’s Sporting Goods detailed how AI investments were reshaping their businesses during their Q1 earnings calls.

title: Five Below nixes ‘Five Beyond’ store section
description: The retailer — which reported a 32% sales bump for Q1 thanks to viral squishy toys — moved the higher-priced inventory in line with the rest of the store.

title: Violife slices through dairy-free cheese misconceptions with social series
description: The brand’s “Undairy the Craving” campaign attempts to combat preconceived ideas surrounding the taste and quality of vegan cheeses.

title: AI agents can’t help if they can’t see your marketing data by Optmyzr
description:
MCP solves the infrastructure problem that kept AI agents stuck at the analysis stage. But raw access to a live ad account is a liability without the guardrails a platform like Optmyzr provides.
The post AI agents can’t help if they can’t see your marketing data appeared first on MarTech.

title: Snowflake’s new AI tools target a marketing pain point
description:
The company is building a platform that lets marketers use AI across the customer journey while maintaining governance, privacy, and data quality.
The post Snowflake’s new AI tools target a marketing pain point appeared first on MarTech.

title: How to make vibe coding sustainable inside the enterprise
description:
AI-generated code moves fast, but organizations still need governance, validation, documentation, and long-term maintenance workflows.
The post How to make vibe coding sustainable inside the enterprise appeared first on MarTech.

title: Meta Rolls Out AI Agent for Enterprises Globally
description: The tool is aimed at small businesses and is part of the social media giant’s push beyond consumers.

title: #213: AI Answers - What AI Should Never Do, Enterprise Scaling, Governing AI & Navigating IT Roadblocks
description:
Leadership wants AI everywhere. IT security can't keep up. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance dig in. And every week brings another story of an AI agent doing something nobody told it to do. Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 listener questions on how to actually move organizations forward and where the real opportunities lie for individuals, SMBs, and enterprises right now.

00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:01 — How do you move a company out of AI policy paralysis?

00:08:54 — How should regulated, hands-on teams introduce AI?

00:12:30 — When companies are stuck, what tends to get them moving?

00:15:00 — Should IT security evolve to adopt AI quicker or should businesses slow down?

00:17:43 — What changes an AI-skeptic employee's mind?

00:21:18 — How should early-career professionals prioritize what to learn?

00:23:29 — Is there a point where you should stop learning and start building?

00:27:29 — Where do companies get stuck scaling AI across departments?

00:29:4

title: YouTube’s AI remix push exposes a looming reckoning for the creator economy
description: YouTube's Gemini Omni integration has highlighted some of the major problems generative AI poses in the creator economy.

title: [AINews] not much happened today
description: a quiet day

title: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
description: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns; at some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.
